raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent provides a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, identifying critical issues and methodological gaps.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, although some citations are not explicitly provided.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence, acknowledging uncertainty in verifying SOTA deltas and supervised facet annotation baselines.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaimed contributions and circular evaluation risks.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, although some minor issues are not explicitly sourced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent provides a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, identifying critical issues and methodological gaps.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, although some citations are not explicitly provided.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence, acknowledging uncertainty in verifying SOTA deltas and supervised facet annotation baselines.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaimed contributions and circular evaluation risks.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, although some minor issues are not explicitly sourced.
